title: JWT payload — real-world examples
description: Illustrative decoded payloads for the three JWT purpose classes. Every payload is HS256-signed via JwtSigner; downstream services verify the signature + `iss`/`aud`/`exp`/`iat` + deny-list + `app` claim (against their configured Application). These examples show the full field set; production payloads never include commented-out fields.

example_user_session.note: Standard tenant-user session JWT issued during a request that needs to propagate context to a downstream service. Purpose = user_session.

example_platform_admin.note: Platform-admin session JWT. tid is null (cross-tenant), sco is empty (cross-organizational). Higher-privilege permissions like platform.identity.viewAny.

example_service_account.note: Machine-to-machine JWT for a service account (e.g. ai-service calling identity-service for user lookup). Purpose = service_account. Longer TTL (up to auth.jwt.extended_ttl_seconds for enterprise integrations).

example_impersonation.note: Impersonation JWT — platform staff acting as a tenant User. purpose=impersonation. sub is the TARGET User's id (not the impersonator's); an additional `impersonator` claim identifies who's actually behind the request for audit purposes. Downstream services can identify impersonation by purpose and audit accordingly.

impersonator.reason: Support ticket #78901 — user reports inability to update athlete profile

signature_verification_algorithm.description: How a downstream service verifies an incoming JWT.
steps: 1. Split the JWT on `.` → [header, payload, signature].
2. base64url-decode the header — verify alg='HS256' + read kid.
3. Look up the kid in the local JWKS cache (refreshed periodically from /.well-known/jwks.json).
5. Constant-time compare with the signature bytes. Mismatch → 401 JWT_INVALID.
8. Verify current hostname is in aud[].
9. Verify exp > now() - auth.jwt.clock_skew_seconds. Expired → 401 JWT_INVALID.
10. Verify iat < now() + auth.jwt.clock_skew_seconds. Future-dated → 401 JWT_INVALID.
12. Verify jti NOT in local deny-list cache (refreshed via pubsub on JwtRevoked events + 15-minute TTL). Present → 403 JWT_DENIED.
13. Trust the payload. Populate the request auth context with sub, roles, permissions.
